steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify task has no unsatisfied dependencies (task.json lists none).

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create mandatory task folder structure (research, plan, results, logs, assets, intervention).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Survey existing corpus papers relevant to morphology-and-DS modeling; link the 5 baseline papers without re-downloading.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Search Google Scholar, PubMed, bioRxiv, ModelDB, arXiv for morphology-to-direction-selectivity modeling papers beyond the baseline.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review prior-task code and libraries (t0022, t0024 DSGC ports) for morphology-handling primitives that inform sweep feasibility.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Write plan.md covering paper-retrieval strategy, synthesis structure, and answer-asset construction.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: literature survey runs on local Windows workstation; no remote compute.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Download and summarise 12-20 new papers per spec; write synthesis answer asset citing baseline + new papers.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines were provisioned.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Propose 3-5 concrete morphology-sweep experiments for the t0022/t0024 testbeds, prioritised by expected information gain.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md and results_detailed.md (Coverage Table + morphology taxonomy + mechanism taxonomy + gaps + recommendations).

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: this task IS a literature survey and does not produce quantitative metrics to compare against publications.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Record follow-up suggestions (morphology-sweep experiments, missing papers, method gaps) in results/suggestions.json.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Finalise logs, write costs.json and remote_machines_used.json, run verificators, open PR, merge, refresh overview.
